name: Synechocystis sp. PCC 6803
shortDescription: A non-pathogenic photosynthetic cyanobacterium. It runs on light and CO2, so biosensors built in it are self-powered — ideal for long-term, deployable environmental and water-quality monitoring without added nutrients.

safety.biocontainment: Light/CO2-dependent growth limits survival; auxotrophic and inducible-essential containment demonstrated.
safety.bslSource: ABSA Risk Group 1; widely used non-pathogenic model cyanobacterium.

engineering.crisprTools: dCas9 CRISPRi established in Synechocystis (Yao et al. 2016).

provenance.source: NCBI Taxonomy; Yao et al. 2016 (CRISPRi in Synechocystis)
